name: Entera Bio Ltd.
summary: Overview Entera is a clinical stage company focused on developing first-in-class oral tablet formats of peptides or protein replacement therapies. We concentrate on underserved, chronic medical conditions for which oral administration of a protein therapy has the potential to significantly shift a treatment paradigm. Our pipeline includes differentiated, first-in-class oral peptides targeting PTH(1-34), GLP-1/Glucagon and GLP-2: Currently, most protein therapies are administered via frequent int...
